title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCLVI. Games.
content:
Thumb bold,
        Thibity-thold,
        Langman,
        Lick pan,
        Mama's little man.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCLVI. Games."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
